---
title: "Coparacao_betas_MC_fast"
author: "Rosemeire do Nascimento"
date: "19/02/2026"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)

library(mvtnorm)
library(smotefamily)
library(ROSE)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(future.apply)
library(progressr)
library(future)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggridges)
library(themis)
library(recipes)

handlers(global = TRUE)

```









```{r}
# 1. Parâmetros
set.seed(1234)

n        <- 10000
p_dims   <- 3             # aumentado para maior robustez
p_list   <- c(0.25, 0.10, 0.01)
n_rep    <- 1000           # ajuste conforme CPU

coef_names <- c("(Intercept)", paste0("x", 1:p_dims))
true_beta  <- c(-2, rep(0.6, p_dims))

form_glm <- as.formula(paste("y ~", paste0("x",1:p_dims,collapse="+")))

plan(multisession, workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1)

```







```{r}
# ================================
# FUNÇÕES
# ================================

compute_beta_metrics_tidy <- function(df, eps = 1e-6){

  df %>%
    group_by(prop, method, coef, true) %>%
    summarise(
      bias = mean(estimate, na.rm = TRUE) - true,
      variance = var(estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
      mse = mean((estimate - true)^2, na.rm = TRUE),
      rmse = sqrt(mse),
      bias_rel = ifelse(abs(true) > eps, bias / true, NA_real_),
      rmse_rel = ifelse(abs(true) > eps, rmse / abs(true), NA_real_),
      mare = ifelse(abs(true) > eps,
                    mean(abs(estimate - true) / abs(true), na.rm = TRUE),
                    NA_real_),
      false_positive_rate = ifelse(abs(true) <= eps,
                                   mean(abs(estimate) > eps, na.rm = TRUE),
                                   NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}



aggregate_beta_metrics_tidy <- function(metrics_df){

  metrics_df %>%
    group_by(prop, method) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rmse_rel = mean(rmse_rel, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_variance = mean(variance, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(prop, mean_rmse)
}
```





```{r}
# 2. Funções Auxiliares
logistic <- function(x) 1/(1+exp(-x))

safe_named <- function(vec){
  out <- rep(NA_real_, length(coef_names))
  names(out) <- coef_names
  if(is.null(vec)) return(out)
  out[names(vec)] <- as.numeric(vec)
  out
}

safe_fit <- function(fun, data, ...){
  if(is.null(data)) return(safe_named(NULL))
  tryCatch(fun(data, ...), error=function(e) safe_named(NULL))
}

# ---------------- GLM ----------------
fit_glm <- function(df){
  safe_named(coef(glm(form_glm,data=df,family=binomial)))
}

fit_glm_weighted <- function(df){
  safe_named(coef(glm(form_glm,data=df,family=binomial,weights=df$pesos)))
}

# ---------------- GLMNET ----------------
fit_glmnet_fast <- function(df,alpha){
  x <- as.matrix(df[,paste0("x",1:p_dims)])
  y <- as.numeric(as.character(df$y))
  cv <- try(cv.glmnet(x,y,alpha=alpha,family="binomial",nfolds=3),silent=TRUE)
  if(inherits(cv,"try-error")) return(safe_named(NULL))
  b <- as.numeric(coef(cv,s="lambda.1se"))
  names(b) <- coef_names
  safe_named(b)
}

# ---------------- PLR ----------------
fit_power_logit <- function(df,gamma=2){
  x <- as.matrix(cbind(1,df[,paste0("x",1:p_dims)]))
  y <- as.numeric(as.character(df$y))
  
  nll <- function(beta){
    eta <- x%*%beta
    p <- (1/(1+exp(-eta)))^gamma
    p <- pmin(pmax(p,1e-10),1-1e-10)
    -sum(y*log(p)+(1-y)*log(1-p))
  }
  
  fit <- try(optim(rep(0,ncol(x)),nll,method="BFGS",
                   control=list(maxit=1000)),silent=TRUE)
  
  if(inherits(fit,"try-error")) return(safe_named(NULL))
  names(fit$par) <- coef_names
  safe_named(fit$par)
}

# ---------------- RPLR ----------------
fit_reverse_power_logit <- function(df,gamma=2){
  x <- as.matrix(cbind(1,df[,paste0("x",1:p_dims)]))
  y <- as.numeric(as.character(df$y))
  
  nll <- function(beta){
    eta <- x%*%beta
    p <- (1/(1+exp(-eta)))^(1/gamma)
    p <- pmin(pmax(p,1e-10),1-1e-10)
    -sum(y*log(p)+(1-y)*log(1-p))
  }
  
  fit <- try(optim(rep(0,ncol(x)),nll,method="BFGS",
                   control=list(maxit=1000)),silent=TRUE)
  
  if(inherits(fit,"try-error")) return(safe_named(NULL))
  names(fit$par) <- coef_names
  safe_named(fit$par)
}
```

---



```{r}
# 3. Técnicas de Reamostragem (Versão Unificada com Recipes)

do_resample <- function(df, metodo) {
  # Garante que y seja fator para o recipe
  df$y <- factor(df$y, levels = c("0", "1"))
  
  # 1. Definição da Receita Base (Limpeza de dados críticos)
  rec_spec <- recipe(y ~ ., data = df) %>%
    step_zv(all_predictors())          # Remove vars constantes (evita NA no GLM)
  
  # 2. Adição do Passo de Reamostragem conforme o método
  rec_spec <- switch(
    metodo,
    "upsample"    = rec_spec %>% step_upsample(y),
    "downsample"  = rec_spec %>% step_downsample(y),
    "rose"        = rec_spec %>% step_rose(y),
    "smote"       = rec_spec %>% step_smote(y),
    "adasyn"      = rec_spec %>% themis::step_adasyn(y, neighbors = 5),
    "smote_tomek" = rec_spec |> step_smote(y) |> step_tomek(y),
    "smote_nearmiss"   = rec_spec |> step_smote(y) |> step_nearmiss(y),
    #"smote_nc"    = rec_spec %>% step_smotenc(y, neighbors = 5),
    rec_spec # Caso padrão (nenhum)
  )
  
  # 3. Execução segura
  dat_final <- tryCatch(
  prep(rec_spec, training = df) %>% juice(),
  error = function(e) NULL
)

return(dat_final)
}

```






```{r}
# 4. Loop Monte Carlo (Versão Otimizada)
time_start <- Sys.time()
all_results <- list()


with_progress({

    prog <- progressor(steps = length(p_list) * n_rep)

  
    
for(prop in p_list){

  message(">>> Proporção: ", prop)
  t_prop_ini <- Sys.time()

    res_prop <- future_lapply(seq_len(n_rep), function(i){

      prog()

      # Geração dos dados
      n1 <- round(prop * n)
      n0 <- n - n1
      X0 <- rmvnorm(n0, rep(0, p_dims), 4*diag(p_dims))
      X1 <- rmvnorm(n1, rep(1/sqrt(p_dims), p_dims), diag(p_dims))
      X  <- rbind(X0, X1)
      colnames(X) <- paste0("x", 1:p_dims)
      
      eta <- cbind(1, X) %*% true_beta
      p   <- logistic(eta)
      y   <- rbinom(n, 1, p)
      df  <- data.frame(X, y = factor(y, levels = c(0, 1)))

      # Cálculo de Pesos (Correção para weighted_glm)
      # Cálculo de Pesos (Versão Estável)
      tab <- table(df$y)
      n0  <- as.numeric(tab["0"])
      n1  <- as.numeric(tab["1"])
      n_total <- n0 + n1

      # Calculamos o peso unitário para cada classe
      # Se a classe 1 for rara, ela ganha um peso maior (proporcional a n0)
      w0 <- n1 / n_total
      w1 <- n0 / n_total

      # Atribuição correta: o ifelse vai aplicar o peso certo em cada linha
      df$pesos <- ifelse(df$y == "1", w1, w0)


      # Técnicas de Reamostragem (Usando a nova função do_resample)
      tr_up    <- do_resample(df, "upsample")
      tr_down  <- do_resample(df, "downsample")
      tr_rose  <- do_resample(df, "rose")
      tr_smote <- do_resample(df, "smote")
      tr_adas  <- do_resample(df, "adasyn")
      tr_sm_t  <- do_resample(df, "smote_tomek")
      tr_sm_n  <- do_resample(df, "smote_nearmiss")
      #tr_sm_nc <- do_resample(df, "smote_nc")

      # Ajuste dos Modelos
      rbind(
        none            = fit_glm(df),
        weighted_glm    = fit_glm_weighted(df, df$pesos),
        ridge           = fit_glmnet_fast(df, 0),
        lasso           = fit_glmnet_fast(df, 1),
        PLR             = fit_power_logit(df),
        RPLR            = fit_reverse_power_logit(df),
        
        up_glm          = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_up),
        down_glm        = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_down),
        rose_glm        = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_rose),
        smote_glm       = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_smote),
        adas_glm        = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_adas),
        smote_tomek_glm = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_sm_t),
        smote_nearmiss_glm   = safe_fit(fit_glm, tr_sm_n)
        #smote_nc_glm    = fit_glm(tr_sm_nc)
      )

    }, future.seed = TRUE,
       future.packages = c("recipes", "themis", "caret", "ROSE", "smotefamily", "glmnet", "mvtnorm", "dplyr"),
       future.globals = TRUE 
    )



  all_results[[as.character(prop)]] <- res_prop
  message("Tempo proporção ", prop, ": ", Sys.time() - t_prop_ini)
  }
})

message("Tempo total: ", Sys.time() - time_start)


```




```{r}
# 5. Consolidação e Métricas

all_coefs <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(all_results), function(prop){

    mats <- all_results[[prop]]

    
  bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(mats), function(i){

    as.data.frame(mats[[i]]) %>%
      rownames_to_column("method") %>%
      pivot_longer(-method,names_to="coef",values_to="estimate") %>%
      mutate(rep=i,prop=as.numeric(prop))
  }))
})
)

true_tbl <- data.frame(coef=coef_names,true=true_beta)
all_coefs <- left_join(all_coefs,true_tbl,by="coef")

metrics_coef <- all_coefs %>%
  group_by(prop,method,coef,true) %>%
  summarise(
    rmse = sqrt(mean((estimate-true)^2,na.rm=TRUE)),
    rmse_rel = ifelse(abs(true)>1e-6,rmse/abs(true),NA_real_),
    .groups="drop"
  )

# Resumo final ordenado pelo melhor RMSE (menor erro)
summary_final <- metrics_coef %>%
  group_by(prop, method) %>%
  summarise(mean_rmse = mean(rmse, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(prop, mean_rmse)

print(summary_final)

```





```{r}
# 6. Gráficos (30 Métodos)

### RMSE Relativo
ggplot(
  metrics_coef %>% filter(abs(true)>0),
  aes(x=reorder(method,rmse_rel),y=rmse_rel)
)+
  geom_col()+
  facet_wrap(~prop,scales="free_y")+
  coord_flip()+
  theme_minimal()+
  labs(title="RMSE Relativo – 30 Métodos",
       x="Método",
       y="RMSE Relativo")

ggsave("rmse_relativo.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```





```{r}
### Densidade
ggplot(
  all_coefs,
  aes(x=estimate,color=method)
)+
  geom_density(alpha=0.2)+
  facet_grid(prop~coef,scales="free")+
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("densidade.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```





```{r}
### Ridge Plot
ggplot(
  all_coefs,
  aes(x=estimate,y=method,fill=method)
)+
  geom_density_ridges(alpha=0.6)+
  facet_grid(prop~coef,scales="free_x")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(legend.position="none")

ggsave("ridge_plot.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```





```{r}
### Violin
ggplot(
  all_coefs,
  aes(x=method,y=estimate,fill=method)
)+
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE,alpha=0.6)+
  facet_grid(prop~coef,scales="free_y")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90,hjust=1),
        legend.position="none")

ggsave("violin.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```









```{r}
# ============================================================
# MÉTRICAS
# ============================================================

metrics_coef <- compute_beta_metrics_tidy(all_coefs)

metrics_summary <- aggregate_beta_metrics_tidy(metrics_coef)

```






```{r}
# ============================================================
# SALVAMENTO AUTOMÁTICO (ROBUSTO)
# ============================================================
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Criar pasta de resultados
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

dir.create("results", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Criar timestamp automático
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1) Estimativas Monte Carlo completas
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

write.csv(
  all_coefs,
  paste0("results/all_coefs_", timestamp, ".csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Versão fixa (sempre sobrescreve)
write.csv(
  all_coefs,
  "results/all_coefs_latest.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 2) Métricas por coeficiente
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

write.csv(
  metrics_coef,
  paste0("results/beta_metrics_coef_", timestamp, ".csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  metrics_coef,
  "results/beta_metrics_coef_latest.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# 3) Métricas agregadas por método
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

write.csv(
  metrics_summary,
  paste0("results/beta_metrics_summary_", timestamp, ".csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  metrics_summary,
  "results/beta_metrics_summary_latest.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

cat("\n==============================================\n")
cat("Arquivos salvos com sucesso em /results\n")
cat("Timestamp:", timestamp, "\n")
cat("==============================================\n")

```






```{r}
# ============================================================
# GRÁFICOS
# ============================================================
ggplot(
  metrics_coef %>% filter(abs(true) > 0),
  aes(x = coef, y = rmse_rel, fill = method)
) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ prop) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "RMSE relativo por coeficiente")


ggsave("rmse_relativo_por_coeficiente.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```
